Localization.Description: Suspicious connection to Check Point hardware. Authentication data differ from the collected profile.

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} from new host {src.host} connected to Check Point hardware on host {event_src.host}. The address is missing from the collected profile.
New user {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} connected to Check Point hardware on host {event_src.host}. The user is missing from the collected profile.
User {subject.account.name} from host {src.host} connected to Check Point hardware using the {object.name} utility on host {event_src.host}. The connection type is missing from the collected profile.
